name: Decadent French Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook corn syrup, butter, and brown sugar in a saucepan until bubbly.
2. Pour the mixture into a 13x9 baking dish and sprinkle chopped pecans over it.
3. Arrange 2-inch slices of French bread over the pecan layer.
4. Beat together eggs, milk, and vanilla extract.
5. Pour the egg mixture over the bread.
6. Refrigerate overnight.
7. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
8. Bake for 45 minutes, inverting the dish halfway through.
9. Serve with whipped cream and fresh strawberries. A nonstick pan makes life easier; watch closely to avoid burning. This can be made up to a day ahead.
